passes.title: Armenian Museum Of America
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides half priced admission for up to 4 individuals including children. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher code on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides half priced admission for up to 4 individuals including children. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher code on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
The pass provides 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets from Boston to Spectacle Island and Georges Island or from Hingham to Peddocks Island.
This is a SEASONAL pass available mid-May through early October.
Georges Island *May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays *June 16 - September 1: daily
Spectacle Island *July 15 - September 1: daily *September 4 - September 21: Thursdays through Sundays *September 26 - October 12: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham *June 15  September 7: every day EXCEPT Tuesdays *September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays
The most up-to-date information can be found at: www.bostonharborislands.org
source_phrases: The pass provides 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets from Boston to Spectacle Island and Georges Island or from Hingham to Peddocks Island.
This is a SEASONAL pass available mid-May through early October.
Georges Island *May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays *June 16 - September 1: daily
Spectacle Island *July 15 - September 1: daily *September 4 - September 21: Thursdays through Sundays *September 26 - October 12: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham *June 15  September 7: every day EXCEPT Tuesdays *September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays
The most up-to-date information can be found at: www.bostonharborislands.org

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text: The pass discount provides half priced admissions for up to 3 individuals including children. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: The pass discount provides half priced admissions for up to 3 individuals including children. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides half priced admission for 1 adult and $1 admission for children (5-17). This returnable pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk and presented upon entry. Returnable passes must be returned to the library. Directions and information regarding the returnable pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides half priced admission for 1 adult and $1 admission for children (5-17). This returnable pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk and presented upon entry. Returnable passes must be returned to the library. Directions and information regarding the returnable pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: Garden In The Woods Native Plant Trust
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides $5 admission fee for 2 adults. Children are admitted for free with pass. This returnable pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk and presented upon entry. Returnable passes must be returned to the library. Directions and information regarding the returnable pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.

Directions and information regarding the returnable pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: Gore Place
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides half priced admission for up to 4 individuals including children. This coupon pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides half priced admission for up to 4 individuals including children. This coupon pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides $10 admission for up to 2 individuals. Advanced ticket reservations made in advance of visit are strongly encouraged on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding the digital pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides $10 admission for up to 2 individuals. Advanced ticket reservations made in advance of visit are strongly encouraged on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding the digital pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person—children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person—children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides $2 admission for up to 4 individuals. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides $2 admission for up to 4 individuals. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides free parking for one vehicle at any DCR park. You may reserve this pass 1 Saturday and 1 Sunday per month. This returnable pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk and presented upon entry. Returnable passes must be returned to the library. Directions and information regarding the returnable pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides free parking for one vehicle at any DCR park. You may reserve this pass 1 Saturday and 1 Sunday per month. This returnable pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk and presented upon entry. Returnable passes must be returned to the library. Directions and information regarding the returnable pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text: Each promo code can be redeemed for 2 adult tickets at $15 each and 4 youth tickets (ages 7-17) at $10 each. Advanced timed ticket reservations on the MFA website are recommended but not required. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

Advanced timed ticket reservations on the MFA website are recommended but not required. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides half price admission for up to 4 individuals including children. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium ticket booth. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides half price admission for up to 4 individuals including children. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium ticket booth. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides $12 admission for up to 2 individuals. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher code on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.
source_phrases: This pass discount provides $12 admission for up to 2 individuals. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher code on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides free admission for up to 5 individuals. This pass is only valid for the museum and does not provide entry to the ship. This returnable pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk and presented upon entry. Returnable passes must be returned to the library. Directions and information regarding the returnable pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass discount provides $9 admission fee for adults and $6 admission fee for children up to 6 individuals including children. This coupon pass must be picked up in person at the Library's Circulation desk. An email will not suffice for admission into the park. Directions and information regarding the coupon pass use will be provided in your confirmation email.
